varieties.description: Edible Young Luffa is a warm-season vegetable variety. Matures in 80 days. Asian ridged luffa; eat at 6 to 8 inches like zucchini. Past 12 inches fiber develops and they become sponge gourds. The defining Vietnamese muop khia. [Source: Kitazawa Seed Company variety notes; UF/IFAS tropical cucurbits] EXPAND-ME: Add UK-specific growing context and flavour notes.
varieties.growingInstructions: Sow indoors 6 weeks before last frost. Transplant 2 weeks after last frost. EXPAND-ME: Add detailed UK-specific growing advice.
